issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as dimension mismatches or eventual consistency delays.
The implementation assumes a Cloudflare Workers environment, limiting portability to other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: create-index-and-insert-vectors
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B fails to meet the specified command syntax, toml binding format, and TypeScript interface and usage.

scenarios.name: query-with-filter-and-namespace
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses the wrong method and filter syntax.
